description: Total number of active workflows.
Total number of audited workflow activations. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of audited workflow deactivations. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of audited workflow executions. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of audited workflow resumptions. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of audited workflow version updates. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of audited workflow executions entering a waiting state. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of cache hits.
Total number of cache misses.
Total number of cache updates.
Total number of credentials. Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
Total number of embed login failures broken down by reason. Available in n8n 2.x and later. Only emits samples after the first failure.
Total number of embed login requests (tagged with `result:success`/`result:failure`). Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of enabled users. Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
Histogram bucket for HTTP request duration in seconds labeled with status_code.
The count of HTTP request duration samples.
The sum of HTTP request duration in seconds.
Whether this main instance is the leader (1) or not (0).
Time elapsed since the last instance activity (backend request).
Total number of manual workflow executions. Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
Total number of node executions that finished. Emitted by worker processes in queue mode (n8n.node.finished event).
Total number of node executions that started. Emitted by worker processes in queue mode (n8n.node.started event).
Number of active libuv handles grouped by handle type. Every handle type is C++ class name.
Total number of active handles.
Number of active libuv requests grouped by request type. Only emits samples for request types currently in flight at scrape time (from prom-client's default collector via process._getActiveRequests).
Total number of active requests.
Number of active resources keeping the event loop alive grouped by async resource type.
Total number of active resources.
The maximum recorded event loop delay.
The mean of the recorded event loop delays.
The minimum recorded event loop delay.
The 50th percentile of the recorded event loop delays.
The 90th percentile of the recorded event loop delays.
The 99th percentile of the recorded event loop delays.
Lag of event loop in seconds.
The standard deviation of the recorded event loop delays.
Node.js external memory size in bytes.
Histogram bucket for garbage collection duration by kind.
The count of garbage collection duration samples.
The sum of garbage collection duration in seconds.
Process heap size from Node.js in bytes.
Process heap size used from Node.js in bytes.
Process heap space size available from Node.js in bytes.
Process heap space size total from Node.js in bytes.
Process heap space size used from Node.js in bytes.
Total user and system CPU time spent in seconds.
Total system CPU time spent in seconds.
Total user CPU time spent in seconds.
Process heap size in bytes.
Maximum number of open file descriptors.
Number of open file descriptors.
Proportional set size of the process in bytes. Available in n8n 2.x and later on Linux.
Resident memory size in bytes.
Process uptime in seconds.
Virtual memory size in bytes.
Total number of production workflow executions. Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
Total number of production root workflow executions (excludes sub-workflows). Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
Number of jobs completed successfully (n8n.queue.job.completed event).
Number of jobs dequeued by workers (n8n.queue.job.dequeued event). Emitted by worker processes in queue mode.
Number of jobs added to the queue (n8n.queue.job.enqueued event).
Number of jobs that have failed (n8n.queue.job.failed event).
Readiness check status (1 if ready with status code 200 otherwise 0) with status code tag.
Total number of runner tasks requested by worker processes.
Current number of jobs being processed across all workers in scaling mode.
Total number of jobs completed across all workers in scaling mode since instance start.
Total number of jobs failed across all workers in scaling mode since instance start.
Current number of enqueued jobs waiting for pickup in scaling mode.
Total number of token exchange failures broken down by reason. Available in n8n 2.x and later. Only emits samples after the first failure.
Total number of identities linked to existing users via token exchange. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of users JIT-provisioned via token exchange. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of token exchange requests. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of users. Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
Histogram bucket for workflow execution duration in seconds. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
The count of workflow execution duration samples. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
The sum of workflow execution duration in seconds. Available in n8n 2.x and later.
Total number of workflows that failed (n8n.workflow.failed event).
Total number of workflows started (n8n.workflow.started event).
Total number of workflows completed successfully (n8n.workflow.success event).
Total number of workflows. Available in n8n 2.x and later when N8N_METRICS_INCLUDE_WORKFLOW_STATISTICS is enabled.
